news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 4, 2025, Pender Growth Fund Inc. (TSXV: PTF) disclosed its financial and operational performance for the year concluding on December 31, 2024.
news.headline: Pender Growth Fund (TSXV: PTF) reveals financial results for year ended Dec 31, 2024.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Cogent Communications Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCOI) disclosed that one of its subsidiaries has successfully priced $174.4 million in aggregate principal amount. This subsidiary, a special-purpose and bankruptcy remote entity entirely owned indirectly by Cogent, executed this financing move.
news.headline: Cogent Communications Holdings, Inc. announced a $174.4 million IPv4 address securitization offering.

news.summary: In the closing hours of trading on Friday, there was a notable increase in selling activity. However, there was a resurgence in homebuilder stocks. The stock market experienced significant losses, with the Dow dropping by 2,200 points as markets plummeted. The Nasdaq also entered bear territory. Live coverage of these events was available on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow plunges 2,200 points, Nasdaq in bear territory. Homebuilder stocks rebound amidst market turmoil.

news.summary: The impact of Trump's tariffs on the market worsened towards the end of the week, resulting in the Nasdaq entering a bear market. Despite their previous strength, some stocks also experienced significant declines. Investors need to reassess their strategies in light of these developments.
news.headline: Nasdaq enters bear market due to Trump tariffs, resilient stocks also affected; market situation intensifies.
Company behind genetic testing service 23andMe has filed for bankruptcy. Uncertain fate of vast genetic data.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 24, 2025, Ascot Resources Ltd. (TSX: AOT; OTCQX: AOTVF) unveiled its audited consolidated financial outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. To access the detailed audited consolidated financial statements, Management's Discussion and Analysis, and Annual Information Form for the same period, interested parties can refer to the Company's submissions on SEDAR+ via www.sedarplus.ca.
news.headline: Ascot Resources Ltd. reports 2024 annual financial results on March 24, 2025. More details on SEDAR+ website. #AOTVF

news.summary: Gold prices have been hitting new highs as economic uncertainty grows due to mixed data and President Trump's tariffs. Prices reached $3,149.03 per ounce, up 18.78% year-to-date as of April 2. Experts attribute this surge to disruptions in global supply chains caused by tariffs, leading businesses to reconsider routes. Capital outflows from emerging markets and increased market volatility are expected. Managing director Sean Hoey notes the surge reflects economic uncertainty fueled by Trump's tariffs, prompting investors to turn to safe-haven assets like gold.
news.headline: Gold surpasses $3,100 per ounce amid economic uncertainty driven by tariffs, up 18.78% YTD. Experts predict continued surge.
NYSE notifies Chegg about non-compliance with listing standards.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) has announced that it will conduct a webcast to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, April 28, 2025.
news.headline: Cadence will host Q1 2025 financial results webcast on April 28, 2025.

news.summary: Investors on Wall Street were prepared for the anticipated unpredictability and strong statements from Trump 2.0. However, his dedication to the significant policy agenda that was central to his 2024 presidential campaign came as a surprise to many.
news.headline: Investors surprised by Trump 2.0's policy agenda with seismic impact as per 2024 campaign, defying expectations.

news.summary: Discover the intriguing investment and retirement planning habits of the millennial demographic. Learn about the surprising trends in millennial investment choices, including stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and managing student loans. Explore how this generation is strategizing for their financial futures in this eye-opening report.
news.headline: Millennials are prioritizing stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and facing student loan challenges. Trends revealed.

news.summary: ValOre Metals Corp. and South Atlantic Gold Inc. have announced on March 26, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, that they have entered into an amalgamation agreement. ValOre, trading as TSX-V: VO, OTCQB: KVLQF, and Frankfurt: KEQ0, will acquire all outstanding common shares of South Atlantic, listed as TSX-V: SAO. The amalgamation will be carried out under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia), with ValOre Subco, a wholly-owned subsidiary of ValOre, and South Atlantic merging to form a new entity named "Amalco," which will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of ValOre. This agreement follows a joint news release made on February 17, 2025.
news.headline: ValOre acquires South Atlantic Gold for 99,924-hectare metals district in Brazil; Amalgamation creates new subsidiary.

news.summary: US stock futures fell on Wednesday, with major benchmark indices showing lower values in premarket trading. Traders are anticipating President Trump’s announcement of reciprocal tariffs, with reports suggesting a possible 20% tariff on a significant portion of the $3 trillion yearly imports. Treasury bond yields were at 4.17% for the 10-year bond and 3.88% for the two-year bond. Markets have an 85.5% probability of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates through May. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indices dropped in premarket trading. S&P 500 gained slightly on Tuesday driven by consumer discretionary, communication services, and information technology sectors, while health care and financial sectors declined. The S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow all saw losses for March and the first quarter, with the Nasdaq declining 10.4% quarterly, Dows 1.3%, and the S&P 500 also recording a loss. Analysts expect increased risk premia due to the uncertainty surrounding the tariff announcements. The market summary includes specific indices' performances and values.
news.headline: US stock futures dip ahead of 'Liberation Day' tariffs announcement. Traders await 20% tariff on $3T imports. Bond yields: 10-year - 4.17%, 2-year - 3.88%. Markets predict 85.5% Fed interest rate maintenance in May. Major indices down in premarket. S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 ETFs drop. S&P 500 saw 5.8% monthly drop; Nasdaq and Dow down 8.2% and 4.2% respectively for March. Analysts suggest higher risk amid uncertainty.

news.summary: Skillsoft, a prominent learning platform, revealed that on April 3, 2025, 25,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) of the Company’s Class A common stock were granted by the Compensation Committee of Skillsoft’s Board of Directors to Fabien Rech. This grant transpired as part of Mr. Rech’s appointment as the Senior Vice President, Sales – EMEA on February 10, 2025.
news.headline: Skillsoft (NYSE: SKIL) grants 25,000 RSUs as employee inducement under NYSE Rule 303A.08 to Fabien Rech, Company's SVP Sales - EMEA.

news.summary: Stay updated with the most recent updates on Alphabet, the parent company of Google, including stock quotes, company news, and analysis of the search giant's stock performance. Find out more about Alphabet's stock (GOOGL) on Investor's Business Daily for comprehensive information on the company's current status and stock chart analysis.
news.headline: Stay updated on Alphabet (GOOGL) stock with news and quotes, analysis by Investor's Business Daily.
US weather agency will maintain research websites, reversing previous decision. - Reports indicate.

news.summary: President Donald Trump will announce a wide range of new tariffs on Wednesday, which could leave the homebuilding industry feeling particularly exposed. Trump, known for his past support of the industry due to his real estate background, is set to introduce these tariffs soon.
news.headline: Trump's new tariffs are expected to impact the vulnerable homebuilding industry significantly.

news.summary: In Feasterville, Pennsylvania, Joe Hand Promotions and All Elite Wrestling (AEW) have joined forces to introduce the Pints and PPVs Program. As the top provider of live sports viewing for businesses like bars, restaurants, and casinos, Joe Hand Promotions aims to enhance fan engagement by turning commercial venues into prime spots for AEW enthusiasts. This initiative will offer customers licensed to broadcast AEW events the opportunity to host communal viewing experiences, fostering a more thrilling atmosphere for fans. The program is designed to solidify these venues as must-visit locations for AEW fans, transforming the way they enjoy watching the matches. Through Pints and PPVs, Joe Hand Promotions is set to revolutionize the viewing experience for fans and businesses alike.
news.headline: Joe Hand Promotions and All Elite Wrestling team up for Pints and PPVs Program in commercial establishments, enhancing AEW fan experiences.

news.summary: Biora has successfully completed its restructuring and is now a privately owned company. The company has secured long-term funding to expedite the advancement of the BioJet™ platform. This move is expected to significantly boost the research and development efforts of Biora, leading to more rapid progress in their innovative technologies.
news.headline: Biora Therapeutics finishes restructuring, now privately held with funding to boost BioJet™ platform development.

news.summary: CIBC Innovation Banking in Atlanta has recently granted venture debt financing to SlicedHealth, Inc. The company is planning to use the funds to enhance its platform and expand its team. SlicedHealth secured a Series A funding round led by Arthur Ventures in July 2024. The company aims to address the challenges faced by hospitals and provider organizations in managing payor contracts due to reliance on outdated manual methods. This funding opportunity will enable SlicedHealth to progress in its growth and technological advancements within the healthcare sector.
news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking lends venture debt to SlicedHealth, with a Series A lead by Arthur Ventures in July 2024.

news.summary: In March, the private sector saw robust job growth in the United States, surpassing expectations and showcasing a resilient labor market amidst concerns over tariff implications. According to the latest Employment Report by Automatic Data Processing, U.S. private employers added 155,000 jobs, a significant increase from February's revised total of 84,000. This figure well exceeded the anticipated 105,000 jobs, indicating a positive trend in employment. Despite uncertainties surrounding policies and cautious consumer sentiment, the overall outcome for March was deemed favorable. The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Private sector added 155,000 jobs in March, surpassing expectations of 105,000, showing resilient labor market amid tariff concerns.

news.summary: The probability of a U.S. recession has increased to 40% from 30%, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s chief global economist, Bruce Kasman. This rise is due to the impact of President Donald Trump's trade policies, particularly the looming rollout of new tariffs. The upcoming trade measures are expected to raise the U.S. tariff rate over 10%, leading to a 0.5% GDP reduction for both the U.S. and global economies by 2025. The concern is that Trump's policies could undermine investor confidence in a business-friendly regulatory environment, potentially exacerbating the economic impact. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: JPMorgan raises U.S. recession odds to 40% due to tariffs, impacting GDP by 0.5% in 2025. Trump's policies pose a triple threat.
Buyback transaction details from March 20 to March 26, 2025 released.

news.summary: The recent implementation of a 25% tariff on imported cars and parts could have severe consequences on the US auto industry. Bank of America predicts this tariff could result in the loss of up to 3 million vehicle sales, cutting automaker profits in half. This move could also lead to chaos within the supply chain as manufacturers rush to reconfigure operations amid rising consumer prices. If manufacturers pass on the full tariff cost to consumers, an estimated 3.2 million units in sales could be lost annually. This tariff, which takes effect on April 3, applies to all imported cars, light trucks, and crucial components like engines and transmissions. Further parts tariffs may be announced in May, exacerbating the situation.
news.headline: Proposed 25% auto tariffs could lead to $26B loss in profits, wipe out 3M vehicle sales, and cause chaos in US auto supply chain.

news.summary: In Rochester, New York, on March 26, 2025, Syntec Optics, a top provider of precision optics for various markets, revealed its initial forecast for the first quarter of 2025. The company anticipates a resurgence in double-digit EBITDA. This optimistic projection is attributed to the diligent work of a fresh team dedicated to enhancing operational efficiency and financial prudence. Additionally, Syntec Optics has persisted in its investments for novel products in space optics, defense technology, biomedical optics, and consumer optics.
news.headline: Syntec Optics projecting double-digit EBITDA in Q1 2025 due to new management and operational efficiency, investing in new products.

news.summary: The National Association of Realtors predicts that mortgage rates will have an average of 6.4% in 2025. Existing-home sales are projected to grow by 6%, while new-home sales are expected to see a 10% increase. Additionally, the national median home price is forecasted to rise by 3% during the same year.
news.headline: February pending home sales increased by 2%, with NAR predicting 6.4% mortgage rates, 6% rise in existing-home sales, 10% in new-home sales, and 3% national median home price increase in 2025.
Approval for Netcompany-SDC merger secured, paving way for $500 million deal.

news.summary: President Trump is set to announce new trade tariffs to address the growing U.S. trade deficit, with reports suggesting tariffs could be as high as 20% on various imported goods. The move aims to tackle a trade deficit exceeding $1.2 trillion in 2024, driven by imports of $3.3 trillion against exports of $2.06 trillion. January and February 2025 saw record monthly goods deficits of $156 billion and $148 billion. Major import sources include Mexico ($510 billion), China ($462 billion), and Canada ($422 billion). The announcement is expected to provoke uncertainty in global supply chains and financial markets, with markets keen on Trump's specific plans and potential diplomatic and economic repercussions.
news.headline: Trump to announce new tariffs, reaching up to 20%, aiming to reduce US trade deficit of $1.2 trillion. Watch at 4 p.m. for details.

news.summary: BitMEX has recently added NILUSDT perpetual swaps to its platform, allowing traders to utilize leverage of up to 50x. This addition expands the trading opportunities available on BitMEX, providing users with increased flexibility in their investment strategies.
news.headline: NILUSDT perpetual swaps with 50x leverage now available on BitMEX, expanding trading choices for users.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency token GUNZ ($GUN) has been recently listed on the BYDFi platform. This token is part of a Layer1 blockchain designed for AAA Web3 games developed by Gunzilla Games. The project has received substantial support, with nearly $100 million in funding backing its development.
news.headline: BYDFi lists $GUNZ token for Gunzilla Games, raising almost $100M to advance AAA Web3 gaming on Layer1 chain.

news.summary: The company has extended an invitation to individual and institutional investors, as well as advisors and analysts, to participate in an online event hosted at VirtualInvestorConferences.com. Interested parties are welcome to join the virtual gathering to engage with the company's representatives and gain valuable insights.
news.headline: Digital Domain will present at AI & Technology Virtual Investor Conference on April 3, 2025. Investors, advisors, analysts welcome.

news.summary: On March 25, 2025, BitMEX implemented a shift in the Mark Method for NILUSDTH25 and REDUSDTZ25 to Fair Price marking. This change aims to improve price accuracy on these trading pairs.
news.headline: BitMEX alters mark method for NILUSDTH25 and REDUSDTZ25 contracts to Fair Price marking from March 25, 2025, improving accuracy.

news.summary: Houston-based Sunnova Energy International Inc. (NYSE: NOVA) has disclosed receiving a notification on April 1, 2025, from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) indicating non-compliance with Rule 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This rule mandates listed firms to uphold a minimum average closing stock price of $1.00 during a continuous 30 trading-day span. The Company has been notified of its failure to meet this requirement.
news.headline: Sunnova gets notice from NYSE for not meeting listing standards due to share price below $1 for 30 days.

news.summary: On April 2, 2025, President Donald Trump introduced a significant trade initiative to address America's trade imbalances, labeling it as the country's "Declaration of Economic Independence." Trump highlighted this date as a historic moment for American industry revival and the resurgence of America's prosperity. The focal point of the trade plan is a new reciprocal tariff system that will be enforced on imports from partner countries. The tariffs will be set at half the rate imposed on U.S. goods by these trading partners. Trump emphasized the importance of April 2nd in American history, likening the action to a monumental declaration.
news.headline: Donald Trump implements reciprocal tariffs on trade partners, setting tariffs at half the rate imposed on US goods.

news.summary: The Dow Jones plummeted by 400 points due to concerns over President Donald Trump's proposed tariffs. Stocks of Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla experienced significant declines in response.
news.headline: Dow Jones plunges 400 points due to Trump tariff threat; Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla also see sharp declines.

news.summary: The Labor Department, under the Trump administration, has reduced funding for international labor rights initiatives, causing concerns among specialists in the field. This decision has led to a significant decrease in financial support for programs addressing labor rights issues abroad.
news.headline: Labor groups suffer as Dept. of Labor cancels international initiatives due to Trump administration cuts, affecting specialists.

news.summary: Stocks on Wall Street continued their upward trend on Wednesday, with investors showing resilience in their risk appetite despite President Donald Trump's imminent announcement of significant trade tariffs. Trump is set to address the nation at 4 p.m. ET on what he named "Liberation Day," with expectations suggesting tariffs of around 20% on a wide array of goods. The S&P 500 is currently up 0.8%, on track for its third consecutive positive session, while the Nasdaq 100 is seeing a strong rebound of 1.1%. Small-cap stocks are outperforming large caps, with the Russell 2000 climbing 1.5%. Most sectors are experiencing gains, excluding defensive consumer staples, with consumer discretionary and tech sectors leading in performance. Treasury yields are increasing, with the 30-year yield reaching 4.57%, up by 5 basis points. For further details, the full story is available on a financial news platform.
news.headline: Wall Street rebounds ahead of tariff announcement; S&P 500 up 0.8%, Nasdaq 100 up 1.1%, Russell 2000 up 1.5%, Bitcoin hits $87,000.

news.summary: Miami - The Dominican Republic, a top Caribbean destination with over 11 million visitors yearly, marked the triumph of its third yearly trade show in Miami on Wednesday, April 2, 2025. The event, now the nation's key international marketing gathering, was overseen by David Collado, the Dominican Republic's Tourism Minister. Kicking off with an opening ceremony and ribbon-cutting, the show aimed to showcase the country's tourist offerings to a wide audience in the industry.
news.headline: Dominican Republic solidifies tourism standing with Miami trade show, attracting over 11M annual visitors.
Trump's policies severely impact Wall Street, causing a significant decline in stock prices and trading volume.

news.summary: In Dallas, Johnston Tobey Baruch is proud to announce that Chad Baruch, the firm's managing shareholder, has been recognized as one of Lawdragon's 100 Managing Partners to Know in 2025. This prestigious list highlights individuals who demonstrate excellence in establishing, expanding, directing, and introducing new ideas in the legal field. Mr. Baruch expressed his gratitude, stating, "It is a truly humbling experience to be included among the top legal professionals in the country. I am privileged to be acknowledged alongside industry peers who are influencing the future."
news.headline: Johnston Tobey Baruch's Chad Baruch named to Lawdragon's 100 Managing Partners to Know in 2025. Recognized for leadership.
TikTok deal structure was largely finalized by Wednesday - sources.
TikTok US spinoff deal was put on hold after China indicated to the White House that it would not approve - sources.

news.summary: In Ocala, Florida, on April 4, 2025, AIM ImmunoTech Inc. (NYSE American: AIM), a company specializing in immuno-pharmaceuticals for various illnesses, such as cancer, immune disorders, and COVID-19, disclosed that NYSE American had halted trading of its common stock. This suspension was due to the low selling price of AIM's stock, prompting NYSE American to initiate delisting proceedings under Section 1003(f)(v) of the NYSE American Company Guide. AIM intends to contest this decision before the Exchange's Listing Qualifications Panel; however, the outcome of any such appeal remains uncertain.
news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech faces delisting from NYSE American due to low stock price; plans to appeal.

news.summary: In Bari, Italy, the theme "Radice" has been revealed for the 2025 Milan Design Week (MDW), a renowned event with over 2,000 exhibitors and attracting nearly half a million international visitors. Milan Design Week is a platform that showcases the latest design and interior decoration collections from top global brands. Natuzzi, a key player in style and innovation since 1977, continues to be a prominent presence at the event. This year, the unveiling of "Radice" at MDW further solidifies Natuzzi's influence in the industry.
news.headline: 2025 Milan Design Week theme is "Rooted in Harmony" unveiled by Natuzzi. MDW has over 2,000 exhibitors and half a million visitors.

news.summary: BofA Securities analyst Craig Siegenthaler revised estimates and price forecasts for broker stocks ahead of earnings season, highlighting potential EPS risks from various sources due to the recent equity market correction. Siegenthaler anticipates a slowdown in net new assets (NNA), particularly in the retail channel compared to wealth management. The correction is expected to impact the second quarter rather than the first quarter of 2025. For Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW), the analyst projects continued growth in net interest income (NII) and net new assets, with an estimate of 4.7% growth, albeit slightly below the company’s target range. Siegenthaler maintains an Underperform rating on Charles Schwab and reduced the price forecast from $74 to $66. EPS estimates were adjusted to $1.03 for the first quarter of FY25 and $4.27 for 2026.
news.headline: BofA analyst predicts slower growth for broker stocks due to market volatility, expects challenges in earnings, raises NII for Charles Schwab, lowers price forecast, revises EPS estimates.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, the U.S. Department of Commerce revealed a preliminary decision regarding an anti-subsidy rate of 14.38% in the sixth yearly assessment of Canadian softwood lumber imports that are deemed unfairly traded in the United States. This determination comes as part of ongoing efforts to address trade imbalances, with the Commerce Department taking action on imports that are seen as negatively impacting domestic industries.
news.headline: US Department of Commerce confirms 14.38% anti-subsidy rate on Canadian softwood lumber imports.

news.summary: Alumis and ACELYRIN have submitted a combined definitive proxy statement detailing their planned merger, set to be finalized in the second quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Alumis and ACELYRIN jointly file definitive proxy statement for merger, set to close in 2Q 2025.
President urges Federal Reserve to cut rates to boost markets, citing economic slowdown.

news.summary: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 24, 2025, after the market closes. The Company, listed as USCB on NASDAQ, is based in Miami. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate key figures and performance metrics from the quarter ended March 31, 2025, in the upcoming report.
news.headline: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. will announce Q1 2025 results on April 24, 2025 after market close (NASDAQ: USCB).

news.summary: The partnership is expanding beyond oil's presence in Europe as part of a global growth strategy. This expansion is a key element in the company's efforts to broaden its reach worldwide.
news.headline: Beyond Oil partners with Mandarin Food Products in the Netherlands, expanding its European presence.
